This file contains the Vs model derived from the joint inversion of Rayleigh wave ellipticity and phase velocity interpolated combined from original 1-D velocity profiles
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
Parameter explanation:
lon, lat, dep: the logitude, latitude, and depth of model nodes
vs: S-wave velocity at each node
dvp: S-wave velocity perturbation relative to average velocities at each depth
uncertainty: velocity uncertainty estimated from MCMC Bayesian inversion

Citation:
Liu, C.-N., F.-C. Lin, H.-H. Huang*, Y. Wang, E. Berg, and C.-H. Lin (2021), High-resolution shear wave velocity 
structures of northern Taiwan revealed by Bayesian joint inversion of Rayleigh wave ellipticity and phase velocity, 
J. Geophys. Res., https://doi.org/10.1029/2020JB021610.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
